apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Permit all access to the new registration endpoint /auth/register.
Refactor OAuth2 authorization code grant configuration to use the lambda-based customizer API.
Refactor OAuth2 login user info endpoint configuration to use the lambda-based customizer API.
Add a helper method to customize token endpoint request parameters for backchannel logout support.
Define a bean for HttpSessionOAuth2AuthorizationRequestRepository to support dynamic user self-registration.
Define a bean for HttpSessionOAuth2AuthorizedClientRepository to manage authorized clients in the session.
Define a bean for HttpSessionOAuth2AuthorizedClientService to persist authorized client data in the session.
Inject ClientRegistrationRepository to enable programmatic OAuth2 authorization request resolution.
Inject AuthorizationRequestRepository to manage the state of OAuth2 authorization requests.
Implement a new endpoint to initiate anonymous user registration via Keycloak's registration flow with PKCE.

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache HttpClient 4.x imports with Apache HttpClient 5.x equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3.x dependencies.
Update SSL socket factory instantiation to use the builder pattern required by HttpClient 5.x.
Introduce explicit connection manager configuration using HttpClient 5.x builders to replace implicit defaults.
Adjust line breaks in method chaining for better readability.
